name: coTfsTPDOGetDataBySyncCyclic
title: coTfsTPDOGetDataBySyncCyclic
syntax: long coTfsTPDOGetDataBySyncCyclic( dword index, dword outLength[], byte outValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
description: This function tries to extract TPDO data using synchronous cyclic method of the test node.
The test was successful if all parts of the tests are executed successfully. If that's the case, the TPDO data are written in outLength[] and outValueBuf[]. Otherwise the data are set invalid.
The parameters outLength[] and outValueBuf[] can be omitted both.
